attacking_style: Long-range solo attacks from reduced breakaways, launching with approximately 20-25km remaining to build significant time gaps before chasers can organize.
team_tactics: Limited team support evident - relies on breakaway positioning rather than domestique-led setups, suggesting CCC's resource constraints or strategic choices.
terrain_preference: Stages suited to breakaways where reduced groups form; capable of sustaining solo efforts over 20+ km distances.
vulnerability: Late-career breakthrough (first GT win at 27) suggests previous limitations from equipment/team support rather than physical capacity; may struggle when requiring full team backing.
key_patterns: Executes long-distance solo attacks from breakaways, 20+ km efforts (1 observation, specific tactic)
Operates effectively without heavy team support in reduced group scenarios (1 observation)
Breakthrough performance timing suggests previously untapped potential or situational constraints (1 observation)
form_trajectory: unknown: Single GT stage win shows capability but insufficient data to determine trend; late-career breakthrough complicates assessment
